summary.label: counter-to-sink
summary.note: Driver crashed on /task/success TimeoutError before saving JSON; data reconstructed from /code/jobs query at run time

v2_service_log_signal: Many '[curobo v0.8] Start or End state in collision' warnings
Then '[curobo v0.8] Joint plan failed, retrying with cleared world'
interpretation: v2 regression: cuRobo 0.8.0's stricter collision check (mesh-default per CHANGELOG) flagged the start state as in collision and refused to plan. wb.move_to_pose raises in the skill → arm bridge gets unstable trajectories → arm server crashes → agent_server auto-recovery SIGTERMs the running code at the lease idle window. Same skill / same sim / same seed succeeded planning under v1 but couldn't grasp the object.
